_comment: Declarative workflow definition for lesson-planner. Each step names an atom sub-skill and describes the data it receives from the previous step. The orchestrator (lesson-planner) calls atoms in order and assembles the result. Teachers can also call any atom directly for one-off tasks.
description: Full lesson plan from grade/subject/topic to differentiated, quality-checked artifact
note: Teachers can call any atom directly for one-off tasks without running the full workflow.
